# MN Rush AAU Basketball

## About
Minnesota Rush is a competitive boys and girls AAU basketball program based in the St. Michael-Albertville area, northwest of the Twin Cities in Minnesota. Founded in 2017.

## Programs
- Boys Program: Grades 3rd-11th (9U-17U). Director: Trevor Walton. Contact: boys@mnrush.com
- Girls Program: Grades 5th-10th. Director: James Bezanson. Contact: girls@mnrush.com

## Season
April through July. Twice weekly practices in the STMA area. 6-8+ AAU tournaments per season depending on age level. Prep Hoops Circuit, MYAS, and AAU events.

## Tryouts
Girls tryouts at STMA Middle School West, 11343 50th St NE, Albertville MN 55301.
- July 29: 5th-6th grade (6-7:30pm), 7th-8th grade (7:30-9pm)
- July 30: 7th-8th grade (6-7:30pm), 9th-10th grade (7:30-9pm)
- August 8: 9th-10th grade (9-10:30am), 5th-6th grade (10:30am-12pm)
$20 tryout fee. Register at mnrush.com/tryouts

## Location
St. Michael-Albertville area, Northwest Twin Cities, Minnesota. Serving St. Michael, Albertville, Rogers, Elk River, Buffalo, Monticello, Big Lake, Zimmerman, Otsego, Delano, Annandale, Maple Lake, and Hanover.
